title: rubus orbifrons
intro: Rubus orbifrons, also known as the Broad-leaved Raspberry or Hill Raspberry, is a species of wild raspberry native to Australia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The leaves and stems of the Rubus orbifrons are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals, offering several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus orbifrons, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
